productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Boys Solid Red Sweatshirts
description: Composition Red hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has full sleeves with Bulls team printed on the left sleeve, ribeed cuffs and hem, and pockets on the front waist Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash below 40 degrees separately Do not dry clean Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decoartions Perfect for your sporting needs, this hooded sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
